Video.summary: Watch as the formidable mother-daughter duo, Lee and Anna Leigh Waters, take on challengers from North Carolina in this Pro Women's Doubles match from the US National Pickleball Center. After an injury, it is great to see the champions partner up again, demonstrating the "fire and ice" style of play that has made them national champions. While the Waters team's game one was a quick 11-point victory, the challengers, Fuzesi and Maloof, handled themselves well on the championship court. The players at home can learn from Anna Leigh's "instigator" shots and two-handed backhand rolls, which she helped bring to the big stage.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Video.summary: Witness an unexpected and electrifying Mixed Pro Doubles showdown from the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida! Originally scheduled for a back court, this highly anticipated match featuring Andre Agassi and Anna Leigh Waters was moved to Championship Court due to overwhelming crowd demand, creating an unforgettable atmosphere. Relive every moment as these top players battle it out in a thrilling display of professional pickleball. Don't miss the action from East Naples Community Park – the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Video.summary: Marcello Jardim and Marco Osorio go head-to-head in the Gold Medal Match of the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships. With power, precision, and nonstop intensity, this Men’s Pro Singles final showcases top-tier talent and a dramatic battle for the championship title.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Video.summary: Catch the exhilarating Men's Pro Doubles match from the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships, powered by Margaritaville! Witness incredible action on the Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida, the paradise coast for pickleball. This thrilling match features the dynamic duo of John Cangelosi and Michael Leonard against their formidable opponents. Get ready for intense rallies, powerful shots, and strategic play from top professional pickleball players. Don't miss this must-watch event from the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart
US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart
US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart

Video.summary: In this US Open semifinal showdown, top seeds Kyle Yates and Andrei Daescu face off against the dynamic duo of Austin Gridley and Mario Barrientos. With strategic finesse and explosive play, both teams battle for a spot in the final. A must-watch clash of styles and strengths on Championship Court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

Video.summary: The Arizona Pickleball League is created -- 5 teams in the league, 4 teams make the playoffs, 1 will not. Meet Kyle Koszuta of the Tempe Tornadoes.
Video.title: S01E01 - The Start

Image.alt: S01E01 - The Start
S01E01 - The Start
S01E01 - The Start

Video.summary: Get ready for an exciting Mixed Split Pro Age pickleball match featuring the formidable team of Jaime Oncins and Simone Jardim against the new pairing of Ryan Miscik and Christie Domoracki. Oncins is a former professional tennis player from Brazil. His partner, Simone Jardim, is a professional pickleball player, a Pickleball Hall of Fame inductee, and was once ranked the number one female player in the world. They face a new team with Ryan Miscik, a pro pickleball player and coach based in Venice, Florida. His partner, Christie Domoracki, is a player located in Boca Grande, Florida. This match brings together a mix of experienced pros and up-and-coming talent for a high-stakes competition on Florida's Paradise Coast.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki

Video.summary: This Men's Senior Pro Doubles match from the US Open 2025 features the team of Schiller and Weinbach battling Bronson and Coker. The commentary captures crucial moments, strategic missteps, and the competitive flow between these seasoned players, ultimately leading to a clear win for Schiller and Weinbach.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker
US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker
US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker

Video.summary: Get ready for a thrilling Pro Mixed Doubles match featuring the number one ranked team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro taking on Simone Jardim and her brother, Marcelo Jardim. This is the first time these two teams are facing off on the Championship Court. Don't miss the action!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Video.summary: Jorja Johnson faces off against Simone Jardim in this match-up of the Women's Pro Single Quarterfinal.

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Singles - Quarterfinal

Video.summary: Sheri Courter and Mari Humberg take on Martina Frantova and Christine Karges in this Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal match at the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships. With fast-paced exchanges, sharp angles, and tactical precision, both teams battle for a spot in the finals on the prestigious Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida. This high-stakes match features standout teamwork and thrilling rallies from some of the sport’s most skilled competitors.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal – Courter & Humberg vs Frantova & Karges

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal – Courter & Humberg vs Frantova & Karges
US Open 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal – Courter & Humberg vs Frantova & Karges
US Open 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal – Courter & Humberg vs Frantova & Karges

Video.summary: Commentators provide an inside look at Game 2 of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida. The Fort Myers Flamingos get off to a dominant start, but the Jacksonville Ballers refuse to give up, staging a dramatic late-game comeback that tightens the score and mounts the pressure. This episode features key players like Stevie, Sophia Dorsey, and Maddalena, with highlights of their strategic plays and powerful shots. Tune in to see if the Flamingos can hold on to their lead and close out the game against the surging Ballers.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: October 10, 2023 - Welcome to week 3 - season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Tempe Tornadoes face-off against the Surprise Stingers.
Video.title: October 10, 2023 - AZ PBL

Image.alt: October 10, 2023 - AZ PBL
October 10, 2023 - AZ PBL
October 10, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: In this Pro Men's Doubles match from the 2025 Minto U.S. Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, the team of Yates and Sobex faces off against Yu and Zwiren. The match is characterized by powerful shots, strategic dinks, and a high-energy atmosphere on the custom-designed Championship court. Commentary highlights the players' transition from singles to doubles and features details about one of the players, Thomas Yu, who previously played tennis at Johns Hopkins University.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren

Video.summary: Get ready for thrilling Pro Men's Doubles pickleball action from the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships at East Naples Community Park, the National Pickleball Center! This semi-final match features the dynamic duo of Richard Livornese Jr. and Ryler Deheart against the formidable team of Ben Newell and Brandon Lane. Witness incredible rallies, aggressive plays, and strategic dinks as these top players battle it out for a spot in Championship Saturday. Don't miss this high-energy competition from the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell

Video.summary: The National Pickleball League heats up as the Indianapolis Drivers take on the Austin Ignite in a coed team match packed with intensity, teamwork, and standout rallies. Representing two competitive NPL franchises, this mixed showdown brings high-level play, strategic depth, and crowd-fueled energy to the court. Whether you're cheering for the Drivers or backing the Ignite, this match is a showcase of what makes NPL team pickleball exciting to watch.
Video.title: NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite

Image.alt: NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite
NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite
NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite

Video.summary: Zing Zang Championship Court from the Franklin 2026 US Open Pickleball Championships from the USOP National Pickleball Center in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: LIVE: US Open Pickleball Championships 2026

Image.alt: LIVE: US Open Pickleball Championships 2026
LIVE: US Open Pickleball Championships 2026
LIVE: US Open Pickleball Championships 2026

Video.summary: Experience the electric atmosphere of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) Season 2 as the Mumbai Pickle Power face off against the Bengaluru Jawans in a high-stakes Tie 9. With Mumbai hunting for their first outright victory and Bengaluru desperate to bounce back from a recent loss, the pressure at the Jio World Garden is at an all-time high. Watch as elite players like the "unstoppable" Katrina Stewart dominate the court in singles, while Brandon Lane and Glaura Carvajal Lane attempt to turn the tide for Mumbai in a masterclass of tactical doubles. This tie features the league’s most innovative strategies, from high-risk Pickle Plays to the pursuit of the prestigious Band of Honor, ensuring every rally is a battle for survival on the road to the semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1

Video.summary: Tennis professional Kevin Anderson teams up with pickleball pro Megan Fudge to face off against former LPGA professional Sherri Steinhauer and teammate Pickleball pro Cierra Gaytan-Leach.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 1

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 1
Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 1
